name: TRACON PHARMACEUTICALS INC
summary: TRACON PHARMACEUTICALS INC is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing targeted therapies for cancer and fibrotic diseases. The company's pipeline includes product candidates that target the tumor microenvironment and the fibrotic process, with headquarters in San Diego, California. TRACON Pharmaceuticals aims to develop innovative therapies that improve the lives of patients with cancer and fibrotic diseases.
